expectedQuestions.decisionValue: testTypeSelection ('화법과 작문' or '언어와 매체') → exam structure differs, time allocation changes [v1 required]. weakBimuNhakCategory (science/tech vs humanities/social) → determines which past exam sets to prioritize.

bimuNhak_average.citation: 오르비 data: average difficulty bimuNhak passage = 5-6min. Unit = passage+question set.

bimuNhak_junkiller.citation: 오르비 data: 준킬러 8-9min. v3 used 7-10min flat, v4 splits by difficulty.

suneungteugang.citation: 수능특강 text-only reading pace. Same as Korean novel pace.

expectedStrategy: 3 plans in PlanGroup: 수능특강(.range) + 기출 5개년(.amount, set unit) + 비문학 1지문/day routine(.check, daily)
6-phase: 3-6월 수능특강+daily routine → June mock exam milestone → 7-9월 기출 실전 풀이(80min timed) → Sep mock exam → 10월-수능 weak point+mock
Daily session: 5.5-8.5min bimuNhak passage (daily required) + 45-50min special/past exam + 5-10min 오답 analysis
EBS 연계: 수능특강 thorough — indirect connection ~50%
Past exam: 80min timed → score → 오답노트 cycle
toneExpectation: frustration-aware — acknowledge bimuNhak weakness as legitimate difficulty, not personal failing
